caption: A man wearing a grey, peaked wig, glasses, a white button-down shirt, a red bowtie, and tan suspenders is seated in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits behind a black microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and shelves displaying clothing and accessories, including a yellow "LEE" tag. White on-screen logos appear in the lower corners of the scene, including "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man transitions from looking straight ahead with a neutral expression to looking down and slightly to his right, then shifting his gaze further to the right with a slight frown, before finally looking back toward the front with a subtle smirk. His head movements are slight, and the background remains static throughout the clip.
